allow: Bash(python -c "import langchain_openai; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(langchain_openai.ChatOpenAI.__init__\); print\(src[:3000]\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:1234/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""model"": ""openai/gpt-oss-20b"", ""messages"": [{""role"": ""user"", ""content"": ""Say hello in one word""}], ""max_tokens"": 10}')

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''src/frontend/i18n/locales/en.json'',''utf8''\)\); const keys=Object.keys\(j\); const sorted=[...keys].sort\(\); const ok=keys.every\(\(k,i\)=>k===sorted[i]\); console.log\(ok?''Keys are sorted'':''Keys NOT sorted''\); if\(!ok\){for\(let i=0;i<keys.length;i++\){if\(keys[i]!==sorted[i]\){console.log\(''First mismatch at'',i,keys[i],''vs'',sorted[i]\);break}}}")

Bash(python -c "import json; j=json.load\(open\(''src/frontend/i18n/locales/en.json''\)\); keys=list\(j.keys\(\)\); s=sorted\(keys\); print\(''sorted'' if keys==s else f''NOT sorted: first mismatch {next\(\(i,k,s[i]\) for i,k in enumerate\(keys\) if k!=s[i]\)}''\)")
